name: HYDROCORT INJ VIAL
description: Injectable steroid medication used to treat inflammation and swelling from rheumatoid arthritis, severe asthma, allergies, and shock conditions.
dosage: Administered by healthcare professional via injection.
storageInstructions: Store under the conditions mentioned on the pack. Keep away from children and pets.

name: IBUGESIC PLUS SYP
description: A pediatric pain and fever suspension combining ibuprofen and paracetamol for relief of pain and fever.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place away from direct sunlight.

name: INTAGESIC MR 1*10TAB
description: Combination medication used to treat pain and muscle stiffness associated with headaches, arthritis, injuries, and menstrual cramps.
uses: Relieving pain and inflammation of muscles, joints, and bones
dosage: Follow doctor's prescription; take at fixed times with water after meals.
storageInstructions: Store below 30°C, away from moisture and heat.

name: INZIT 4 1*10TAB
description: A medication used for lowering high blood pressure and managing chest pain caused by reduced blood flow to the heart.
storageInstructions: Store in dry conditions at room temperature, away from direct sunlight and humidity.

name: INZIT 8 1*10
description: Medication used for lowering high blood pressure and managing chest pain caused by reduced heart blood flow.
uses: Improved blood flow and heart efficiency
storageInstructions: Store in dry conditions at room temperature, away from moisture, sunlight, and humidity.

name: ITASPOR 130 1*10
description: Antifungal medication used to treat fungal and yeast infections in various parts of the body, such as the skin, mouth, nails, feet, and hands.
dosage: Swallow whole with water; take with meals.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature, away from excess heat and moisture.

name: ITRACIP 200 1*4CAP
description: Antifungal medication used to treat fungal and yeast infections in various parts of the body, such as the skin, mouth, nails, feet, and hands.
uses: Fungal infections of skin, mouth, and nails
dosage: Take with meals to gain optimal benefits, as prescribed by the doctor.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature, away from excess heat and moisture.
